title: Offensive Magic Strategy
content: Offensive spells are used to weaken enemy provinces before attacks by reducing military, economy, population, or effectiveness.

title: Defensive Magic Strategy
content: Defensive spells improve province survival by protecting military, economy, and battlefield performance.

title: Spell Timing Strategy
content: The timing of spells is important. Cast offensive spells before coordinated attacks and defensive spells before expected enemy actions.

title: Fireball Strategy
content: Fireball damages enemy provinces by reducing peasants and resources. Used to weaken enemy economy and population.

title: Meteor Showers Strategy
content: Meteor Showers creates ongoing pressure against an enemy province through repeated damage.

title: Chastity Strategy
content: Chastity limits enemy population growth and reduces recovery ability.

title: Amnesia Strategy
content: Amnesia reduces enemy science progress and weakens long term province development.

title: Greed Strategy
content: Greed reduces enemy economic efficiency and increases resource pressure.

title: Pitfalls Strategy
content: Pitfalls increases losses suffered by attacking armies and improves defensive effectiveness.

title: Reflect Magic Strategy
content: Reflect Magic provides protection against enemy spells by returning magical effects.

title: Magic Shield Strategy
content: Magic Shield improves province protection against hostile magic.

title: Inspire Army Strategy
content: Inspire Army improves offensive military effectiveness and is commonly maintained by attackers.

title: Love and Peace Strategy
content: Love and Peace provides province protection and supports defensive play styles.

title: Greater Protection Strategy
content: Greater Protection improves province defense by reducing losses and protecting military value.

title: Town Watch Strategy
content: Town Watch increases defensive population participation during attacks.

title: War Spoils Strategy
content: War Spoils affects gains and recovery during war conditions.
